AboutFeaturesPricing
Five Powerful Modules

Everything Your
Facility Needs

One platform, five integrated modules — designed from the ground up for the realities of nursing care.

NurseAI

AI-Powered Care Assistant

Your intelligent clinical companion

NurseAI is the brain of NurseOS — an AI-powered assistant that helps nurses make better clinical decisions, automate routine documentation, and monitor patients in real-time. Built specifically for nursing workflows, not generic healthcare AI.

Clinical Decision Support

Evidence-based recommendations at the point of care, tailored to local protocols and guidelines.

Automated Care Plans

Generate, customize, and update patient care plans automatically based on assessments and outcomes.

Symptom Analysis

AI-driven symptom checking that helps nurses prioritize and escalate patient concerns appropriately.

Real-time Alerts

Proactive notifications for critical patient changes, medication reminders, and care milestones.

Natural Language Charting

Speak or type naturally and NurseAI converts your notes into structured clinical documentation.

Platform

Built for Real-World Healthcare

Under the hood, NurseOS is engineered for the unique challenges of healthcare in emerging markets.

Real-time Sync

All modules sync instantly across devices and facilities.

End-to-End Encryption

Patient data is encrypted at rest and in transit.

Mobile-First Design

Built for the nurses on the floor, not at a desk.

Multi-Language

Support for English, Yoruba, Igbo, Hausa, and more.

Offline Mode

Core functionality works without internet connection.

API Integrations

Connect with existing EMR, HR, and billing systems.

Ready to Experience NurseOS?

Start free today and see how NurseOS transforms your facility's nursing care.
